---
description: "Create or update the Product Requirements Document from a project idea or stakeholder input. Use when starting a new project or refining product scope."
agent: po
---

Create or update the Product Requirements Document in `specs/prd.md` using `/prd-skill`.

Gather requirements from the user's input. If the input is vague, ask clarifying questions before writing. If `specs/prd.md` already exists, update it in place — preserve existing requirement IDs and add new `REQ-N` entries as needed.
